meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of two fried eggs on toasted sourdough with a glass of purple kefir smoothie with banana and blueberries, natural morning light, wooden table, appetising
day_of_steps: 1. Pour 250 ml kefir into a blender, add half a banana and 80 g blueberries, blend until smooth. Pour into a tall glass.
2. Toast 40 g (Diego) / 30 g (Diana) sourdough bread in a toaster.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat with a few drops of olive oil.
4. Crack 2 eggs (Diego) / 2 eggs (Diana) into the pan, fry 2–3 min until whites are set and yolks still slightly runny.
5. Slide eggs onto toast. Season with black pepper and sea salt.
6. Serve with the kefir smoothie on the side.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a crisp green apple sliced on a small wooden board beside a small bowl of raw almonds, natural light, minimal styling
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice one apple.
2. Weigh out almonds into a small bowl.
3. Eat apple slices first, then almonds.

meals.name: Mexican Chicken & Chickpea Bowl with Roasted Peppers, Couscous & Lime
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a vibrant Mexican-spiced chicken bowl with golden couscous, roasted red peppers, chickpeas, cherry tomatoes and a wedge of lime, colourful ceramic bowl, natural light
prep_steps: Sunday: Marinate chicken breast in cumin, paprika, garlic powder, olive oil and lime juice.
Sunday: Bake marinated chicken at 200°C for 22 min; cool, slice, store in airtight container.
Sunday: Roast sliced bell peppers and cherry tomatoes with olive oil, cumin and oregano at 200°C for 20 min; store in container.
Sunday: Drain and rinse canned chickpeas; store in container.
day_of_steps: 1. Boil kettle. Place 70 g (Diego) / 55 g (Diana) dry couscous in a bowl, pour over just-boiled water to cover by 1 cm, cover with a plate for 5 min, then fluff with a fork.
2. Reheat sliced chicken (150 g Diego / 120 g Diana) and roasted peppers/tomatoes in a pan over medium heat for 3–4 min with a splash of water.
3. Add 80 g (Diego) / 60 g (Diana) drained chickpeas to the pan for the last 2 min.
4. Place couscous in a bowl, top with chicken, chickpeas and roasted veg.
5. Squeeze half a lime over the bowl. Drizzle 1 tsp olive oil. Add 1 cup mixed salad greens on the side.
6. Serve with 1 cup fresh cherry tomatoes on the side and a piece of fruit.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: a small bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with fresh blueberries and crushed walnuts, natural light, white ceramic bowl on a linen cloth
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with blueberries and roughly crushed walnuts.
3. Eat immediately.

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Garlic-Spinach & Sweet Potato Mash
meals.image_prompt: a plate of baked salmon fillet with golden-edged sweet potato mash and wilted garlic spinach, drizzled with olive oil, warm evening light, appetising plating
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Peel and dice sweet potato; boil in salted water for 15 min until soft.
2. Season salmon fillets with paprika, garlic powder, sea salt and black pepper. Place on a lined baking tray.
3. Bake salmon for 14–16 min until cooked through.
4. Drain sweet potato; mash with 1 tsp olive oil, sea salt, black pepper and a pinch of turmeric.
5. Heat 1 tsp olive oil in a pan, add minced garlic clove, cook 30 sec, add spinach and toss for 2 min until wilted. Season.
6. Plate: mash base, salmon fillet on top, spinach on the side.
7. Drizzle with a few drops of balsamic vinegar over spinach if desired.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Pear & Blueberries + Eggs on Sourdough with Low-Fat Cheese
meals.image_prompt: two fried eggs on toasted sourdough with melted cheese, a glass of pale green kefir smoothie with pear and blueberries, natural light, marble countertop, fresh and bright
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with 1 small pear (cored, cubed) and 60 g blueberries until smooth.
2. Toast sourdough bread.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in a non-stick pan with a tiny drop of olive oil over medium heat.
4. Place eggs on toast, lay a slice (20 g) of low-fat cheese on top and let it melt slightly from the egg heat.
5. Season with black pepper. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Pear with Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: a ripe yellow pear sliced on a small plate beside a small pile of whole walnuts, natural light, clean white background
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice pear.
2. Weigh walnuts into a small bowl.
3. Eat pear first, then walnuts.

meals.name: Asian Sesame Chicken Bowl with Stir-Fried Broccoli, Carrots & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a Buddha-style bowl with brown rice, tender sesame-glazed chicken slices, bright green broccoli and orange carrot sticks, drizzled with sesame oil and soy sauce, modern ceramic bowl, natural daylight
prep_steps: Sunday: Slice chicken breast; marinate in soy sauce, sesame oil, ginger powder and garlic powder for 30 min, then stir-fry in batches over high heat until cooked; cool and store in container (use Mon–Wed).
Sunday: Parboil broccoli florets 2 min, refresh in cold water; store in container.
Sunday: Julienne or coin-slice carrots; store raw in sealed bag.
day_of_steps: 1. Cook brown rice fresh: rinse 75 g (Diego) / 60 g (Diana) dry brown rice, simmer in 250 ml water for 25 min. (Start this first — brown rice takes longest.)
2. Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
3. Add carrot slices (80 g each), stir-fry 3 min; add parboiled broccoli (100 g Diego / 80 g Diana), stir-fry 2 min.
4. Add pre-cooked chicken (150 g Diego / 120 g Diana), toss with 1 tbsp soy sauce and a pinch of ginger powder, heat through 2 min.
5. Serve rice in a bowl, top with stir-fry. Add 40 g mixed salad greens on the side.
6. Serve with a piece of fruit.

ingredients.item: Chicken breast cooked (blanc de poulet cuit)
Chicken breast cooked (blanc de poulet cuit)

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: sliced red apple fanned out on a small plate with a handful of raw almonds, natural light, minimal
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice apple.
2. Portion almonds.
3. Eat apple first, then almonds.

meals.name: Tuna & White Bean Salad with Cucumber, Cherry Tomatoes & Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a rustic tuna and white bean salad with cucumber rounds, cherry tomatoes, and mixed greens, a slice of toasted sourdough on the side, drizzled with olive oil and balsamic vinegar, natural light, Mediterranean feel
prep_steps: Sunday: Drain and rinse canned white beans; store in container.
day_of_steps: 1. Drain 1 can (140 g) tuna per person.
2. Slice cucumber (80 g each) into rounds. Halve cherry tomatoes (80 g each).
3. In a large bowl combine tuna, white beans (80 g Diego / 60 g Diana), cucumber, tomatoes and 40 g mixed salad greens.
4. Dress with 1 tsp olive oil, 1 tsp white wine vinegar, black pepper and sea salt.
5. Toast sourdough bread.
6. Serve salad with toast on the side.

ingredients.item: Canned tuna in water (thon en boîte au naturel)
Canned white beans (haricots blancs en boîte)
White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)
Canned tuna in water (thon en boîte au naturel)

meals.image_prompt: two golden fried eggs on toasted sourdough bread beside a tall glass of thick purple-blue kefir smoothie, fresh morning light, wooden table
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with half a banana and 80 g blueberries until smooth.
2. Toast sourdough bread.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in a non-stick pan with a tiny drop of olive oil.
4. Place eggs on toast, season with black pepper and sea salt.
5. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Orange & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: a peeled orange split into segments on a plate beside a small bowl of almonds, natural light, white ceramic
day_of_steps: 1. Peel and segment orange.
2. Portion almonds.

meals.name: Asian Sesame Chicken Bowl with Zucchini, Spinach & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a brown rice bowl with sesame-glazed chicken, sautéed zucchini ribbons and wilted spinach, topped with a drizzle of sesame oil and soy sauce, rustic bowl, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Cook brown rice fresh: 75 g (Diego) / 60 g (Diana) dry, simmer 25 min.
2. Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a pan; slice zucchini into half-moons and sauté 3–4 min over medium-high heat.
3. Add spinach (80 g each), toss until wilted, season with soy sauce and garlic powder.
4. Add pre-cooked sesame chicken (150 g Diego / 120 g Diana) from batch, heat through 2 min.
5. Serve rice in bowl, top with chicken and vegetables.
6. Serve with a piece of fruit (apple or orange).

ingredients.item: Chicken breast cooked (blanc de poulet cuit)
Chicken breast cooked (blanc de poulet cuit)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Apple & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: thick Greek yogurt in a small white bowl topped with thin apple slices and crushed walnuts, natural light, minimalist styling
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon Greek yogurt into bowl.
2. Slice half an apple and place on top.
3. Crush walnuts and sprinkle over.
4. Eat immediately.

meals.name: Mediterranean Baked Salmon with Roasted Zucchini, Cherry Tomatoes & Couscous
meals.image_prompt: a plate of herb-spiced baked salmon fillet over fluffy couscous with golden roasted zucchini and burst cherry tomatoes, drizzled with olive oil and balsamic vinegar, warm evening light, Mediterranean style
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Slice zucchini into coins and halve cherry tomatoes; toss with olive oil, oregano, black pepper on a baking tray.
2. Roast vegetables for 15 min.
3. Season salmon with oregano, paprika, salt and garlic powder. Nestle onto the veg tray and bake a further 13–15 min.
4. While salmon bakes: put dry couscous in a bowl, pour over hot water or stock (1:1.5 ratio), cover 5 min, fluff.
5. Plate: couscous base, salmon on top, roasted veg alongside.
6. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar and remaining olive oil.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Pear & Blueberries + Eggs on Sourdough with Low-Fat Cheese
meals.image_prompt: two fried eggs on golden sourdough toast with a slice of melted cheese, beside a glass of creamy kefir smoothie, morning light streaming through a window, rustic wooden table
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with 1 small pear and 60 g blueberries until smooth.
2. Toast sourdough bread.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in a non-stick pan with a drop of olive oil.
4. Top eggs with 20 g low-fat cheese; let residual heat melt slightly.
5. Season with black pepper. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: crisp apple slices fanned beside a small bowl of almonds on a white plate, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice apple.
2. Weigh almonds.
3. Eat apple first, then almonds.

meals.name: French-Style Chicken & Lentil Bowl with Roasted Carrots, Spinach & Harissa
meals.image_prompt: overhead of a warm French-inspired bowl with sliced chicken, green lentils, roasted orange carrots and wilted spinach, drizzled with harissa-olive oil dressing, rustic bowl, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Toss carrot coins with olive oil, cumin, salt; roast on a tray for 20 min.
2. Season chicken breast with paprika, garlic powder, salt, black pepper. Heat pan to medium-high, cook chicken 5–6 min per side until done. Rest 2 min, slice.
3. Drain and rinse canned lentils; warm in a pan with 1 tsp olive oil, cumin and a splash of water for 2 min.
4. Wilt spinach in the same pan for 1 min.
5. Mix 1 tsp harissa paste with 1 tsp olive oil and a squeeze of lime for the dressing.
6. Assemble bowl: lentils base, chicken slices, roasted carrots, spinach. Drizzle harissa dressing.
7. Serve with a piece of fruit.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: white bowl of thick Greek yogurt topped with blueberries and slivered almonds, natural light, clean minimal styling
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon Greek yogurt into a bowl.
2. Add blueberries on top.
3. Sprinkle almonds. Eat immediately.

meals.name: Mexican Chicken Taco Bowl with Black Beans-Style Chickpeas, Roasted Peppers & Corn Tortillas
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a Mexican taco bowl with seasoned chicken strips, spiced chickpeas, roasted red and yellow peppers, corn tortillas on the side, topped with Greek yogurt and lime, vibrant colours, natural light
day_of_steps: 1. Slice bell peppers; toss with olive oil, cumin, paprika, salt and roast in oven at 200°C for 18 min.
2. Cut chicken into strips; season with cumin, paprika, garlic powder, salt. Cook in a pan over medium-high for 6–7 min until cooked through.
3. Drain chickpeas; add to pan with a pinch of cumin and soy sauce, toss 2 min.
4. Warm corn tortillas in a dry pan for 30 sec each side.
5. Assemble: plate peppers and chickpeas, top with chicken strips, add dollop of Greek yogurt. Serve tortillas on the side with a squeeze of lime.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: a plate with two sunny-side up eggs on thick sourdough toast alongside a tall glass of blueberry-banana kefir smoothie with a swirl of purple, bright morning kitchen light
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with half a banana and 80 g blueberries.
2. Toast sourdough.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in minimal olive oil.
4. Place eggs on toast, season with black pepper.
5. Serve with smoothie.

meals.image_prompt: sliced golden pear on a small board with a handful of walnuts, natural morning light, minimal
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice pear.
2. Weigh walnuts.
3. Eat pear first, then walnuts.

meals.name: Tuna Niçoise-Style Bowl with Lentils, Cucumber, Cherry Tomatoes & Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a Niçoise-inspired salad bowl with canned tuna, green lentils, cucumber slices, cherry tomatoes and mixed greens, drizzled with olive oil and white wine vinegar, a slice of sourdough on the side, natural light
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of fish seafood only keeps ~2 day(s), and this is day 5. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
1. Drain canned tuna and canned lentils.
2. Slice cucumber and halve cherry tomatoes.
3. Combine tuna, lentils, cucumber, tomatoes and mixed salad greens in a large bowl.
4. Dress with olive oil, white wine vinegar, black pepper and sea salt.
5. Toast sourdough bread and serve on the side.
6. Serve with a piece of fruit (apple or banana).

White wine vinegar (vinaigre de vin blanc)

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Pear & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: creamy Greek yogurt in a bowl with thin pear slices and scattered almonds, natural afternoon light, clean white ceramic
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon Greek yogurt into bowl.
2. Core and thinly slice half a pear; arrange on yogurt.
3. Top with almonds. Eat immediately.

meals.name: Chicken & Mushroom Stir-Fry with Soy-Ginger Glaze, Broccoli & Wholewheat Pasta
meals.image_prompt: a bowl of wholewheat pasta noodles topped with tender chicken strips, sautéed mushrooms and bright green broccoli in a glossy soy-ginger sauce, chopsticks on the side, modern bowl, natural evening light
day_of_steps: 1. Cook wholewheat pasta according to packet in salted boiling water (al dente ~10 min). Drain.
2. Slice chicken breast into thin strips; season with garlic powder, ginger powder, black pepper.
3. Heat 1 tsp sesame oil in a wok over high heat. Add chicken, stir-fry 5–6 min.
4. Add sliced mushrooms (80 g each) and broccoli florets (80 g each); stir-fry 4 min.
5. Add 1 tbsp soy sauce, pinch of ginger powder and a splash of water; toss to glaze.
6. Toss pasta into the wok and combine. Serve immediately.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Banana & Blueberries + Eggs on Sourdough with Low-Fat Cheese
meals.image_prompt: two fried eggs on sourdough with melted cheese, next to a tall glass of blueberry-banana kefir smoothie, warm Saturday morning light, linen napkin, cosy kitchen
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with half a banana and 80 g blueberries.
2. Toast sourdough bread.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in a non-stick pan.
4. Place eggs on toast; add 20 g low-fat cheese on top.
5. Season with black pepper. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Orange & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: peeled orange in segments on a small plate beside a little pile of walnuts, natural bright light
day_of_steps: 1. Peel and segment orange.
2. Weigh walnuts.
3. Eat orange first, then walnuts.

meals.name: Mediterranean Chicken Traybake with Roasted Bell Peppers, Zucchini, Chickpeas & Couscous
meals.image_prompt: overhead photo of a golden Mediterranean traybake with chicken thighs, colourful roasted peppers, zucchini and chickpeas over fluffy couscous, garnished with a wedge of lemon, natural light, ceramic platter
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Slice bell peppers and zucchini; toss with chickpeas, olive oil, cumin, paprika, oregano, garlic powder, salt, pepper on a roasting tray.
2. Season chicken breast with paprika, cumin, garlic powder, salt; place on tray nestled among veg.
3. Roast for 25–28 min until chicken cooked through and veg golden.
4. Meanwhile, prepare couscous: pour just-boiled water over dry couscous (1:1.5 ratio), cover 5 min, fluff.
5. Plate couscous, top with chicken and veg. Squeeze lime over.
6. Serve with a piece of fruit.

meals.name: Apple with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: sliced green apple with a small bowl of almonds, natural afternoon light, white plate
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice apple.
2. Weigh almonds.
3. Eat apple then almonds.

meals.name: Baked Salmon with Roasted Broccoli, Mushrooms & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: a plate with a golden baked salmon fillet beside cubed roasted sweet potato, charred broccoli florets and sautéed mushrooms, drizzled with olive oil and balsamic vinegar, warm evening light, white plate
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Cube sweet potato; toss with olive oil, paprika, salt and roast 25 min on a tray.
2. Add broccoli florets to the tray after 10 min of sweet potato roasting; roast remaining 15 min together.
3. Season salmon with turmeric, paprika, garlic powder, salt; place on a separate baking sheet, bake 14 min.
4. In a small pan, sauté sliced mushrooms in 1 tsp olive oil with garlic powder and thyme for 4 min.
5. Plate sweet potato and broccoli, add mushrooms, place salmon on top.
6. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar.

meals.name: Kefir Smoothie with Pear & Blueberries + Fried Eggs on Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: two fried eggs on toasted sourdough with a tall glass of pale green kefir smoothie with pear and blueberries, Sunday morning brunch light, wooden table, relaxed styling
day_of_steps: 1. Blend 250 ml kefir with 1 small pear and 60 g blueberries.
2. Toast sourdough bread.
3. Fry 2 eggs per person in a non-stick pan.
4. Season with black pepper and sea salt.
5. Serve with smoothie.

meals.name: Apple & Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: sliced apple on a wooden board beside whole walnuts, natural Sunday morning light
day_of_steps: 1. Rinse and slice apple.
2. Weigh walnuts.
3. Eat apple then walnuts.

meals.name: Harissa-Spiced Chicken & Lentil Stew with Roasted Carrots, Bell Peppers & Couscous
meals.image_prompt: a deep bowl of harissa-red chicken and lentil stew with roasted carrots and peppers over fluffy couscous, swirl of Greek yogurt on top, natural light, rustic ceramic, Middle-Eastern-Mediterranean feel
day_of_steps: 1. Cut chicken breast into chunks; season with cumin, paprika, coriander, salt.
2. Heat olive oil in a deep pan; brown chicken chunks 3–4 min.
3. Add diced bell peppers, sliced carrots and 1 tsp harissa paste; stir 2 min.
4. Add drained canned lentils, 200 ml tomato passata and 150 ml water. Simmer 15 min.
5. Prepare couscous: pour hot water over couscous, cover 5 min, fluff.
6. Serve stew over couscous with a dollop of Greek yogurt on top.
7. Serve with a piece of fruit.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Blueberries & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: thick Greek yogurt in a small ceramic bowl with blueberries and scattered almonds, soft natural afternoon light, minimal styling
day_of_steps: 1. Spoon yogurt into a bowl.
2. Top with blueberries and almonds.
3. Eat immediately.

meals.name: Tuna & Chickpea Stuffed Bell Peppers with Tomato Passata & Sourdough
meals.image_prompt: baked stuffed red and yellow bell peppers filled with tuna and chickpeas in tomato sauce, a slice of crusty sourdough on the side, white plate, natural evening light, rustic Mediterranean styling
day_of_steps: 1. Preheat oven to 200°C. Halve bell peppers lengthways; remove seeds. Place on a baking tray.
2. Mix drained tuna, drained chickpeas, tomato passata, garlic powder, cumin, oregano, black pepper in a bowl.
3. Fill each pepper half generously with tuna-chickpea mixture.
4. Top with a little low-fat cheese; bake 22–25 min until peppers are soft and top is golden.
5. Toast sourdough bread while peppers bake.
6. Serve stuffed peppers with sourdough on the side. Drizzle with olive oil.

ingredients.item: Canned tuna in water (thon en boîte au naturel)
Canned tuna in water (thon en boîte au naturel)
